agent_reasoning: Demand is high due to the Transport Hub's POI mix, with a high number of food and business establishments, leading to increased EV charging activity. The bursty load profile and high charging capacity of the hub further amplify the demand.
price_rationale: Residential users are more price-sensitive, so a moderate price increase is suggested to manage load stress without discouraging users. The price elasticity rule is applied to avoid extreme changes.
